Petition To Require Trustee To Pay Attorneys Fees, Etc.
Off Calendar Nov-01-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Tom Huster appearing for Frank Nay, petitioner to the fees petition and objector to the final account. Peter Myers appearing for trustee. Mr. Huster stated he has to file this petition because the trustee has disobeyed the Court's order to pay the attorney's fees. Mr. Myers agrued that the Court's order is ambiguous as to who shall receive the check. Court ordered him to write the check to the Huster Law Group. Court needed an order settling final account and for final distribution. That matter is submitted. Mr. Myer wanted to include the payment to the Huster Law Group in the order. Mr. Huster argued that it was a prior order that ordered the payment and he should be paid now. Court ordered Mr. Myers to pay the fee now and he can include that in the order. Mr. Huster requested for fees for making this motion. That issue is taken under submission.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
